daily.today_energy: Mercury's vibes are hitting different today—your intuition is sharper than usual. Trust those gut feelings, especially about people. This is your moment to speak your truth without overthinking it.
daily.love: Someone's been noticing your energy shift lately. Whether you're coupled up or single, today's about authentic connection over surface-level stuff. Don't be afraid to be a lil vulnerable.
daily.career: Your organizational skills are literally unmatched rn. Channel that big Virgo energy into wrapping up loose ends. Small wins today set the tone for something bigger brewing next week.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement today—doesn't have to be intense, just something that feels good. A walk, stretching, dancing in your room, whatever. Listen to what your energy actually needs.

weekly.overview: Mercury's doing its thing in your sector of self-discovery this week. You're picking up on vibes others are missing—trust that intuition. Small shifts in perspective are setting you up for something bigger. Stay curious and a little bit flexible.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, this is about getting real with what you actually want. Stop performing the role you think you should play. Someone (or your own heart) is ready for the authentic version of you to show up.
weekly.career: Your focus is sharp and your ideas are hitting different. This is the week to speak up in that meeting or pitch what you've been sitting on. Your organized energy is magnetic rn—people are paying attention to what you bring to the table.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for consistency over intensity. Those small daily habits you've been thinking about? Start them now. You'll feel the shift in your energy and mood faster than you'd expect. Listen to what feels good.
